steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
Replace $x$ with the requested input, $3$, in the function. Keep the function rule the same and change only the input value.
$$f(3)=3^2+3+74$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content:
Square first, then add all three terms. This gives the value of the function at the requested input.
$$f(3)=9+3+74=86$$
The answer is 86.
